dismissalText.commentary: Pathum Nissanka c Brevis b Mukesh Choudhary 19 (15b 3x4 1x6 18m) SR: 126.66

dismissalComment.html: taken by Brevis at mid-on! Pace-off from Mukesh on a good length and Nissanka was through the shot too early, he wanted to clobber that over the leg side but ended up spooning it to Brevis, who back-pedalled from mid-on to take a simple catch

dismissalText.commentary: Ruturaj Gaikwad c Sameer Rizvi b Ngidi 6 (13b 1x4 0x6 19m) SR: 46.15

dismissalComment.html: Gaikwad's game is over, and it's a tame end. He leans across and flicks a good length ball in the air and straight to the fielder at deep square leg. That was a pace-on delivery, Ngidi is yet to bowl a slower one today.

dismissalText.commentary: Urvil Patel st †Rahul b Patel 17 (9b 0x4 2x6 11m) SR: 188.88

dismissalComment.html: he's been stumped! Urvil came forward a bit too early, Axar shortened his length and zipped the ball through, spinning it past the outside edge of Urvil's attempt to hit down the ground, Rahul had the bails off in a flash. Urvil had dragged his foot out of his crease and it was in the air as he tried to regain his ground when the bails came off
